MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Feb-21-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DECKERS OUTDOOR CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

The hearing on defendant Deckers Outdoor Corp.'s "motion for change of venue" is continued to February 21, 2023 to permit discovery regarding venue-related issues. The parties may file supplemental briefs (maximum five pages) re the venue discovery on or before February 7, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
